Mashed_Bloodmoon.LycanthropeBeastHuntDef.label: beast hunt: Alpha Wolf
Mashed_Bloodmoon.LycanthropeBeastHuntDef.description: Consume the heart of a Nordbergian alpha wolf.

Mashed_Bloodmoon.LycanthropeBeastHuntDef.label: beast hunt: Yeti
Mashed_Bloodmoon.LycanthropeBeastHuntDef.description: Consume the heart of a yeti.
